title: Auto Bucket Clutch V2
description: This Data Pack Lets You Do A Automatic Water Bucket Clutch.
body:
- **If You Want To Play My First Version Of This Data Pack Click Here: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/auto-bucket-clutch](https://modrinth.com/datapack/auto-bucket-clutch)**

Remember The Auto Bucket Clutch Only Works In Your Mainhand Not Your Offhand.

I Remade This Data Pack Because The First One Was Buggy And I Didn't Really Know How To Code Data Packs That Good Back Then, So Injoy This Remade Version Of This Data Pack. :)

**This Data Pack Lets You Do A Automatic Water Bucket Clutch, To Do A Auto Bucket Clutch look Straight Down When Falling, The Auto Bucket Clutch Will Trigger If You Are Falling From A Hight Of 4 Blocks Or Higher.**
